title: Locking Headers
excerpt: We would like to be able to lock the headers within a board so as you scroll down through your groups you can still be able to filter, sort, change views, etc. without having to scroll back to the top. We have groups tha…

posts.author: kwetzel (Katelyn Wetzel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like to be able to lock the headers within a board so as you scroll down through your groups you can still be able to filter, sort, change views, etc. without having to scroll back to the top. We have groups that have over 100 items in them and it makes it difficult to have to scroll to the top every time you want to filter.

Screenshot 2021-02-12 1626011478×400 22.4 KB

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
@kwetzel Agreed. This was requested last year too but hasn’t received any attention from the Monday engineers yet.

Add your vote to the previous feature requests.

We need to always see Search and Views options in the header Feature requests
Two of the more powerful basic features in Monday.com is the search bar, and the ability to customize views and easily switch between views. The problem is that as soon as you start to scroll through a board, those two features hide along with the rest of the header…and you can’t get back to them again until you fully scroll back to the top of the pulse list. The header is big, especially if you use the description section, so hiding/minimizing some of that header makes sense. However, I’d…
Freeze/make heading of board static Feature requests
Could you make the top header portion of boards static so that it doesn’t move as we scroll down through the groups. This would save time to always have this in view and accessible when wanting to add a new Group or integration or automation, or to search/filter, etc. 2019-08-05_1301

posts.author: Momof6 (Deborah Martineau)
posts.cookedHtml:
I could really use this feature. When I have multiple boards that I am working on, I get a phone call and then have to remember which board I am working on… the ONLY way is to scroll all the way to the top to see and start again. PLEASE make the header be able to be locked in place like on an excell spreadsheet. SUPER helpful and time saving. I also use the search feature and wish I could just have that locked in place as well. The best thing I can find to help that is when I use the shortcut… CTRL + F it will take me to the top of the board to search for something. Grateful for that at least.
Thank you!

posts.author: Momof6 (Deborah Martineau)
posts.cookedHtml: When I explained my problem to a co-worker they noticed that the Tab at the top of the Google or Edge, etc. does change to the board I am working on. At least there is that. I find that helpful and will use it until the feature is improved.

posts.author: adgrubbs (Amy G)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree that it would be nice to have the headers locked, or an easy button to “return to top” that stays visible regardless of how far down you scroll through items.
@Momof6 Thank you for the tip with the CTRL+F. That is a nice workaround.
